name: Blond Brownies- Beverly's
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together flour, baking powder, and salt. Set aside.
2. Melt butter and brown sugar in a saucepan. Allow to cool.
3. Add eggs one at a time to the melted mixture.
4. Stir in the flour mixture.
5. Fold in chocolate chips and pecans.
6. Pour batter into a jelly roll pan.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 25-30 minutes, or until set. Do not overcook.
8. The batter is very thick. Cut into squares when cool.
